context: Tests whether the agent implements coupon validation with the correct TypeScript interface, all five error codes, code normalization, discount-cap logic, and validation logging as specified in the coupon-management skill.

checklist.name: CouponValidationResult interface
checklist.description: A TypeScript interface named CouponValidationResult is exported with fields: valid (boolean), discountAmount (number), and an optional errorCode

checklist.name: All five error codes
checklist.description: errorCode type includes all five values: 'EXPIRED', 'USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED', 'MIN_ORDER_NOT_MET', 'NOT_FOUND', 'CUSTOMER_LIMIT_REACHED' (no others substituted)

checklist.name: Code normalization on lookup
checklist.description: The code is passed through toUpperCase() and trim() before the database lookup (not just in the response)

checklist.name: Unreleased code returns NOT_FOUND
checklist.description: When starts_at is in the future, the function returns errorCode 'NOT_FOUND' (not a custom 'NOT_STARTED' or similar code)

checklist.name: Usage limit check
checklist.description: Checks usage_count >= usage_limit (only when usage_limit is not null) and returns USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED

checklist.name: Per-customer limit check
checklist.description: Queries a redemptions table/store to count how many times the customer has used this coupon, returning CUSTOMER_LIMIT_REACHED when exceeded

checklist.name: Percentage cap respected
checklist.description: calculateDiscount applies Math.min(raw, max_discount_amount) when max_discount_amount is set for percentage coupons

checklist.name: Free-shipping returns zero
checklist.description: calculateDiscount returns 0 for 'free_shipping' type coupons (not an error — zero subtotal discount)

checklist.name: Fixed-amount capped at subtotal
checklist.description: calculateDiscount for fixed_amount returns Math.min(coupon.value, subtotal) — does NOT allow discount to exceed the order total

checklist.name: Validation attempts logged
checklist.description: The code records or logs each validation attempt including failures (e.g. inserts a record, logs with reason code, or persists to a store)

checklist.name: validateCoupon function signature
checklist.description: validateCoupon accepts at minimum: code (string), customerId (string), orderSubtotal (number), and itemIds (array)

checklist.name: validateCoupon return type
checklist.description: validateCoupon is async and returns Promise<CouponValidationResult>
